summary.intent: Review GitHub PR #439 on moltis-org/moltis, check that all Greptile review comments and PR comments were addressed, and resolve/dismiss any that were already fixed.
summary.outcome: The PR branch was checked out locally and key files were read, but the transcript is incomplete — it ends mid-investigation of page-mcp.js without confirming all comments were resolved. Unrelated files (Cargo.toml, web_fetch.rs) were modified.

repo: PR #439 touches crates/web/src/assets/js/page-mcp.js as a primary file under review
The repo is located at /Users/penso/tmp/molt/moltis and can be checked out locally for branch inspection
Greptile automated reviews are used alongside manual PR comments on this project

code.finding: Contains functions buildSseEditPayload and InstallBox component; these were the focus of review comments around indentation and edit form display name issues

workflow: GitHub CLI (gh) was used to fetch PR details, comments, review comments, and diffs
When gh API/diff commands were insufficient to inspect branch code, the PR branch was checked out locally via git
Multiple Read tool passes were needed on the same large JS file to cover different line ranges

friction: gh pr diff and patch parsing did not reliably surface the current branch state of specific functions, requiring a local checkout
page-mcp.js appears to be a large file requiring multiple partial reads to navigate
The transcript ends abruptly — it is unclear whether all PR comments were ultimately resolved or dismissed
open_items: Confirm all Greptile and manual review comments on PR #439 are resolved/dismissed after verifying fixes in page-mcp.js
Investigate why Cargo.toml and crates/tools/src/web_fetch.rs were modified during this session — these changes appear unrelated to the PR review task
